Spend 1 Ammo
[CriticalOnSucceedAttack] Double the application of Tremor & Rupture Potency and Count

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 4 Rupture and +2 Rupture Count

1040601.name: A S.B.
1040601.desc: If this unit has 7+ Poise at Turn End, heal 8 SP.

1040602.name: A S.B.
1040602.desc:
- Always Active : Begin encounters with 7 Ammo
- If this unit has 7+ Poise at Turn End, heal 8 SP.

1040611.name: A S.B.
1040611.desc:
- Always Active : Begin encounters with 7 Ammo
- If this unit has 7+ Poise at Turn End, heal 8 SP.
- If this unit already has max SP upon meeting the above condition, gain 1 Poise next turn

1040621.name: The Lucky Cig
1040621.desc: If 1 ally with the least Ammo uses up their last Ammo with a Coin, deal 50% of the damage dealt by that Coin attack against each target as bonus damage against each individual target. (rounded up)

1040631.name: The Lucky Cig
1040631.desc:
- If 1 ally with the least [Bullet] uses a Skill that spends [Bullet], gain 3 Poise. (once per turn; does not apply to allies without Ammo)
- If 1 ally with the least Ammo uses up their last Ammo with a Coin, deal 50% of the damage dealt by that Coin attack against each target as bonus damage against each individual target. (rounded up)
